title: astragalus kerianus
intro: Astragalus kerianus, also known as Astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae, which is native to the mountainous regions of Malaysia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus kerianus include immune system support, anti-fatigue properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. Astragalus kerianus can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
